who: construction project managers using Google Workspace
offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 equipment logs/month, inefficient tracking causes missed maintenance schedules. We automate the preparation of usage logs instead of manual logging and spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Inefficient tracking of equipment usage and maintenance summaries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Participate in forums for construction project management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for equipment usage and maintenance summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing logs
